---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

**What command did you send?**
e.g. `battery`, `open youtube`

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**What did you expect?**

**Setup**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- AI backend: [Ollama / Gemini / Claude / OpenAI / OpenRouter]
- Interface: [Telegram / CMD]

**Logs**
Paste relevant lines from `data/hullar.log` (or use the `bot logs` command).
